text: Some of the interesting topics discussed in this course could be treated substantially more extensive and detailed in order to get a better grip and understanding on them ( e . g . Gibbs sampling ) . After this course , it is a bit dazzling how much different algorithms and methods are available for clustering and retrieval tasks and this course easily could have been subdivided into two or three separate courses on the same topic with a more detailed treatment . Still , about many interesting subjects a tip of the iceberg has been brought to you . it tastes so good that you would like to have much more !
